# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is the Product Ops Sandbox. Follow `AGENTS.md` for the full workflow map.

In short, to run a workflow: read the matching prompt in `ai-workflows/prompts/`, read the notes,
sample data, or generated outputs named by that prompt, and write the result to `outputs/` as a
`.json` draft that matches the schema in `ai-workflows/schemas/`, plus a readable `.md` summary.
The weekly readout and planning review are Markdown only.

Use only the evidence in the notes. Do not invent facts, numbers, or company names. Keep all data
fictional, anonymized, or approved. AI drafts; humans review; teams decide.

Reusable `/prompt` files for each workflow are in `.github/prompts/`.
